panels.text: [thoughtful] AI is already inside the organization. [pause] In meetings. In documents. In every decision. [soft exhale] But scattered use... is not transformation.
[confident, deliberate] The CEO and CHRO decide. [pause] AI must serve organizational goals — [resolute] not as a trend, but as a lever for real business value.
[building intensity] The real challenge [pause] is not choosing another AI tool. [dramatic pause] It is translating strategy [pause] into a new way of working.
[inspired, authoritative] Three levels. One connected system. [pause] Improve. Integrate. Impact. [beat] The 3I Framework for HR AI Implementation.
[engaged, purposeful] This is where AI moves beyond personal productivity [pause] into how teams actually work. [pause] Recruitment. Learning. Performance. Redesigned.

panels.scene: Scene 8 — Closing: The New Architecture for Work
panels.text: [profound, resonant] AI implementation is not a technology project. [pause] It is a new architecture for work. [long pause] The question is not whether AI will change work. [emphatic] The question is — who is designing the way it happens?
